title: RRR
desc: Fearless revolutionary and British officer, unite for freedom against despotic rulers, forging an inspirational path.

desc: Hosted by Sreemukhi, this show delivers nonstop fun as Maa families play musical games, compete with friends, and chase cash prizes in an upbeat, entertaining competition.

title: K-Ramp
desc: Reckless Kumar goes to Kerala to reform, falls for Mercy who struggles with PTSD. Their love shatters when he walks away, forcing both to confront healing.

title: Premante
desc: A couple's perfect marriage following their cute first meeting is tested when the wife grows suspicious of her husband's odd conduct, leading to a revelation that transforms their view of love.

title: Sarvam Maaya
desc: After crossing paths with a ghost, a Hindu priest embarks on an enlightening journey that causes him to question his faith, his identity and everything he believed to be true.

title: Cooku With Jathiratnalu S02
desc: A cooking reality show blends humor and culinary skills as participants prepare dishes with creativity and entertainment, delivering fun challenges and delightful moments.

desc: An energetic entertainment show aimed at families, featuring games, comedy, performances, and celebrity guests-designed to bring joy, laughter, and shared memories.

title: Slot - Dhurandar
desc: A mysterious traveler slips into Karachi's underworld, climbs its ranks with precise skill, and secretly dismantles the ISI-Underworld nexus from within, reshaping power and fate.

title: Hara Hara Mahadeva
desc: Hara Hara Mahadeva is a mesmerising, visually stunning story of Lord Shiva and his avatars. Witness the Lord as a sansarik in this mythological show.

title: Maha Bharatam
desc: Watch for an epic retelling of the ancient Indian saga filled with drama, mythology and valor.

desc: A divine tale of eternal love between Lord Krishna and Radha, symbolizing spiritual devotion and emotional depth, as they transcend time and form to unite hearts across ages.

desc: Goddess Parvati incarnates as Renuka and Yellamma to safeguard against evil in royal and village settings.
